Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Continued To Mar-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: The following cases were heard: PTR-13-297016 The Kathryn C. Qvale Marital Trust, PTR-13-297014 The Kathryn C. Qvale Nonexempt Marital Trust and PTR-13-297143 The Kjell H. Qvale Survivor's Trust.

Appearances: Dominic Campisi for (petitioner) Jeffrey Qvale. John Keker, Ben Berkowitz, Warren Braunig, Abhishek Bajoria & Peter Myers for Bruce Qvale & Laura Hiera. Edward Koplowitz for (beneficiary) Christopher Qvale. Monica Dell'Osso

Mr. Campisi stated that while he has been given a substantial amount of documents he still does not have specific documents that are needed, that taxes are due and they are trying to resolve payments due to the IRS. He also stated that he will be filing a petition for instructions. Mr. Keker interjected that we are here for the petition to remove and to set a trial date and that his party is ready for trial but that Mr. Campisi is stalling. Mr. Keker is ready for mediation in September and trial in November or December. Mr. Campisi is willing to go forward but is worried about notice to unknown parties and is struggling to work with the redacted copies. Discussion was held as to dates for mediation and trial. The court suggests two rounds of mediation with a deadline of October 31, 2014 to have some of the mediation accomplished and a stipulation to extend that deadline if necessary. All matters were referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial on March 2, 2015, (order for the same signed in open court). Mr. Keker suggests that the three cases (297016, 297017, 297143) be consolidated, and that the survivors trust can have its own section in any pleadings and will submit a stipulation and order to consolidate. It was discussed that the trustees cannot be removed without an evidentiary hearing. The court requested Mr. Campisi to submit a pleading to convince the court that an evidentiary hearing is appropriate by the end of the week and for Mr. Keker to respond. A definitive answer will be given at the August 27, 2014 motion hearing.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Ella Yip. Court Reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR No. 8052, 925-360-6065. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Reported)

Ms. Dell'Osso stated that she was just appointed on December 23rd, that she was not prepared to waive objections, that she is not sure what position she will need to take and that she needs more time. Both Petitions for Appointment of Successor Independent Trustee to Fill Vacancy were continued to February 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
